mapper.select: SELECT v.id AS voucherId, v.shop_id AS shopId, s.name AS shopName, v.title, v.pay_value / 100.0 AS payValue, v.actual_value / 100.0 AS actualValue, sv.stock, sv.total_stock AS totalStock, sv.begin_time AS beginTime, sv.end_time AS endTime, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(s.images, '$[0]')) AS image FROM tb_voucher v JOIN tb_seckill_voucher sv ON sv.voucher_id = v.id JOIN tb_shop s ON s.id = v.shop_id WHERE v.type = 1 AND v.status = 0 AND v.deleted = 0 AND sv.end_time > NOW() AND sv.deleted = 0 ORDER BY CASE WHEN sv.begin_time <= NOW() AND sv.end_time > NOW() THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, sv.begin_time ASC LIMIT #{pageSize}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_seckill_voucher SET stock = stock - 1 WHERE voucher_id = #{voucherId} AND stock > 0 AND deleted = 0
UPDATE tb_seckill_voucher SET stock = stock + 1 WHERE voucher_id = #{voucherId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT sv.voucher_id, sv.session_id, sv.stock, sv.total_stock, sv.begin_time, sv.end_time, v.shop_id, v.title, v.sub_title, v.pay_value, v.actual_value FROM tb_seckill_voucher sv JOIN tb_voucher v ON sv.voucher_id = v.id WHERE sv.session_id = #{sessionId} AND sv.deleted = 0 AND v.deleted = 0 ORDER BY sv.begin_time ASC LIMIT #{offset}, #{pageSize}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_seckill_voucher WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} AND deleted = 0
